definitions: A female given name of Finnish origin, meaning 'wave'.
Denny Laine (born 1944), an English musician, singer, and songwriter, best known as a member of The Moody Blues and Wings.
Frankie Laine (1913–2007), an American singer whose career spanned over 75 years, known for his jazz, pop, and country music.
examples: Laine is a popular name in Finland.
Denny Laine was a founding member of Wings.
Frankie Laine had many hit songs.
